name: Oncosil Medical Ltd
analysis: OSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 71% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.6100, stop A$0.4257, target A$0.6800 (0.38:1) — then trail it.
